channel.title: The Joe Rogan Experience
channel.description: The official podcast of comedian Joe Rogan. Follow The Joe Rogan Clips show page for some of the best moments from the episodes.

item.title: #668 - Jon Ronson
item.description: Jon Ronson is a writer and documentary filmmaker whose works include the best-selling The Men Who Stare at Goats. His latest book So You've Been Publicly Shamed is available to purchase now on Amazon. http://www.jonronson.com/

item.title: #667 - Kurt Metzger
item.description: Kurt Metzger is a comedian, actor and writer. He also has a podcast called "Race Wars" he co-hosts with comedian Sherrod Small available on Spotify.

item.title: #666 - Duncan Trussell
item.description: Duncan Trussell is a stand-up comedian, and host of his own podcast “The Duncan Trussell Family Hour” available on Spotify.

item.title: #665 - Neal Brennan
item.description: Neal Brennan is a stand-up comedian, actor, writer, director and producer. He is known for co-creating and co-writing "Chappelle's Show" with Dave Chappelle.

item.title: #663 - Dominic Monaghan
item.description: Dominic Monaghan is an English actor, known for his role in "The Lord of the Rings" trilogy and on the tv show "LOST" He also has a wildlife documentary series called "Wild Things with Dominic Monaghan" which airs on the Travel Channel.

item.title: Fight Companion - June 20, 2015
item.description: Joe is joined by Brendan Schaub, Bryan Callen, and Tony Hinchcliffe to watch the fights on June 20, 2015.

item.title: #662 - Vinny Shoreman
item.description: Vinny Shoreman is a mind coach and kickboxing & muay thai commentator and coach. http://www.vinnyshoreman.com/

item.title: #661 - Rutledge Wood
item.description: Rutledge Wood is one of the hosts of Top Gear on History Channel. He also works as a reporter for NBCSports & NASCAR on NBC.

item.title: #660 - Jim Florentine
item.description: Jim Florentine is a comedian known for hosting That Metal Show on VH1 as well as his own podcast called "Comedy Metal Midgets."

item.title: #659 - Dean Delray
item.description: Dean Delray is a stand up comedian. He has his own podcast called "Let There Be Talk".

item.title: #658 - Greg Fitzsimmons
item.description: Greg Fitzsimmons is a stand-up comedian. He also hosts his own podcast "FitzDog Radio" available on Spotify.

item.title: #657 - Corey Knowlton
item.description: Corey Knowlton is an international hunting expert, known recently for winning a $350,000 auction to kill a black rhino in Namibia. He is also known for working with hunter Jim Shockey on television shows "The Professionals" and "Uncharted".

item.title: Podcast from a Car #2
item.description: This episode is only available as audio. Joe and Cameron Hanes recorded a podcast in a car while returning from a recent hunting trip. Cameron Hanes is a bowhunting athlete, “training intensively each and every day to become the Ultimate Predator.”

item.title: #656 - Bryan Callen
item.description: Bryan Callen is an actor and stand-up comedian, and together with Brendan Schaub he also hosts "The Fighter & The Kid" podcast available on Spotify. http://bryancallen.com

item.title: #655 - Kevin Folta
item.description: Kevin Folta is a land-grant scientist exploring ways to make better food with less input, also learning and teaching how to effectively communicate science to the public. He is also a professor in and chairman of the Horticultural Sciences Department at the University of Florida, Gainesville.

item.title: #654 - Rich Vos
item.description: Rich Vos is a stand up comedian. He and his wife, Bonnie McFarlane, have a documentary "Women Aren't Funny" available now on iTunes.

item.title: #653 - Natasha Leggero
item.description: Natasha Leggero is a comedian, known for her appearances on the Comedy Central Roasts of James Franco & Justin Bieber. Her new show "Another Period" premieres on Comedy Central June 23rd.

item.title: #652 - Ricky Schroder
item.description: Ricky Schroder is an actor and film director. He debuted in the 1979 hit film The Champ, going on to become a child star on the sitcom Silver Spoons. His latest work is a docu-series called "The Fighting Season".

item.title: #651 - Jordan Gilbert (c9n0thing)
item.description: Jordan Gilbert is a professional gamer better known as "c9n0thing" on the internet. He is currently best known for playing Counter Strike: Global Offensive and can be seen streaming his gameplay at http://www.twitch.tv/n0thingTV

item.title: #650 - Nick Curson
item.description: Nick Curson is a strength and conditioning coach known for working with UFC World Champion Rafael Dos Anjos and Russian boxer Ruslan Provodnikov. http://www.speedofsport.com/

item.title: #649 - Jonathan Gottschall
item.description: Jonathan Gottschall is an American literary scholar specializing in literature and evolution. He teaches at Washington and Jefferson College in Pennsylvania and his latest book, The Professor in the Cage, is available now. http://jonathangottschall.com/

item.title: Fight Companion - May 16, 2015 (Part 1)
item.description: Joe is joined by Aubrey Marcus, Eddie Bravo & Brendan Schaub to watch the fights on May 16, 2015.

item.title: Fight Companion - May 16, 2015 (Part 2)
item.description: Joe is joined by Aubrey Marcus, Eddie Bravo & Brendan Schaub to watch the fights on May 16, 2015.

item.title: #648 - Adam Scorgie
item.description: Adam Scorgie is an independent filmmaker, most commonly known for his work on The Culture High, The Union: The Business Behind Getting High & Ice Guardians. http://www.theculturehigh.com/

item.title: #647 - Dom Irrera
item.description: Dom Irrera is a stand up comedian, and also hosts his own podcast called "Dom Irrera Live from The Laugh Factory" available on Spotify. http://www.domirrera.com/

item.title: #646 - Dr. Dan Engle & Aubrey Marcus
item.description: Dr. Dan Engle, MD is a practicing psychiatrist, board certified in psychiatry and neurology. Aubrey Marcus is writer, entrepreneur, and adventurer. Some of his writings and experiences can be found on his website, WarriorPoet.us, as well as links to his latest venture, Onnit Labs.

item.title: #645 - Joe Schilling
item.description: Joe Schilling is an American Muay Thai kickboxer and MMA fighter who competes in the super middleweight and light heavyweight divisions.

item.title: #644 - Brad WIlliams
item.description: Brad Williams is an actor and stand-up comedian. Brad has a new special airing May 8 on Showtime called "Brad Williams: Fun Size" and he also hosts his own podcast called "About Last Night."

item.title: #643 - "Big" Jay Oakerson
item.description: Big Jay Oakerson is a stand up comedian and he also hosts his own show "Legion of Skanks Podcast" available on Spotify. http://bigjaycomedy.com

item.title: #642 - Rich Roll
item.description: Rich Roll is a plantpowered wellness advocate, bestselling author, ultra-athlete and host of "The Rich Roll Podcast," available on Spotify. http://www.richroll.com/

item.title: #641 - Sam Harris
item.description: Sam Harris is a neuroscientist and author of the New York Times bestsellers, The End of Faith, Letter to a Christian Nation, and The Moral Landscape. His latest book "Waking Up: A Guide to Spirituality without Religion" is available now.

item.title: #639 - Greg Proops
item.description: Greg Proops is a stand-up comedian, also well-known for his improv comedy on the show "Whose Line is it Anyway?". He currently hosts his own podcast called "The Smartest Man In The World", available on SPotify, and has a new book available in May 2015 called "The Smartest Book In The World".

item.title: #638 - Aubrey de Grey
item.description: Aubrey de Grey is an English author and theoretician in the field of gerontology and the Chief Science Officer of the SENS Research Foundation. http://sens.org/

item.title: #637 - Remi Warren
item.description: Remi Warren is a hunter, adventurer, and videographer. His new show "Apex Predator" is on the Sportsman Channel and available at http://apexpredator.tv

item.title: #636 - Bryan Callen
item.description: Bryan Callen is an actor and stand-up comedian, and together with Brendan Schaub he also hosts "The Fighter & The Kid" podcast available on Spotify. http://bryancallen.com

item.title: #634 - Abby Martin
item.description: Abby Martin is an American journalist and former host of "Breaking the Set" for RT America. Check out her work at http://mediaroots.org

item.title: #635 - Jim Norton
item.description: Jim Norton is a stand-up comedian, radio personality, author, and actor. His latest special "Contextually Inadequate" debuts April 24 on Epix.

item.title: #633 - Alex Winter
item.description: Alex Winter is a filmmaker and actor known best as Bill S. Preston, Esquire, from the "Bill & Ted's Excellent Adventure" franchise. His latest film "Deep Web" tells "the untold story of Bitcoin and The Silk Road" and is available on May 31 on Epix. http://www.deepwebthemovie.com/

item.title: Fight Companion - April 11, 2015 (Part 1)
item.description: Joe is joined by Eddie Bravo & Brendan Schaub to watch the fights on April 11, 2015.

item.title: Fight Companion - April 11, 2015 (Part 2)
item.description: Joe is joined by Eddie Bravo & Brendan Schaub to watch the fights on April 11, 2015.

item.title: Podcast from a Car
item.description: This episode is only available as audio. Joe and Bryan Callen recorded a podcast in a car while driving to a recent hunting trip. Bryan Callen is an actor and stand-up comedian. Together with Brendan Schaub he hosts "The Fighter & The Kid" podcast available on Spotify.

item.title: #632 - Les Stroud
item.description: Les Stroud is a Canadian musician, filmmaker, and survival expert best known as the creator, writer, producer, director, cameraman and host of the television series Survivorman. New episodes of Surivorman begin airing on The Science Channel in April.

item.title: Podcast in a Swedish Hotel Room
item.description: This episode is only available as audio. Joe and Tony Hinchcliffe recorded a podcast a few weeks ago while in Sweden after doing two shows of comedy. Tony Hinchcliffe is a comedian, writer, and actor. He also hosts his own podcasts called “Kill Tony” with Redban, and it’s available on Spotify under "Deathsquad" and at http://Deathsquad.tv

item.title: #631 - Josh Barnett
item.description: Josh Barnett is an MMA fighter, currently fighting in the UFC Heavyweight division.

item.title: #629 - Andrew Hill, PhD
item.description: Andrew Hill, PhD, is a lecturer, scientist, explorer, and also the lead neuroscientist at TruBrain.

item.title: #630 - Duncan Trussell
item.description: Duncan Trussell is a stand-up comedian, and host of his own podcast “The Duncan Trussell Family Hour” available on Spotify.

item.title: #628 - Garry Tonon & Eddie Bravo
item.description: Garry Tonon is a World Champion jiu jitsu black belt. Eddie Bravo is a jiujitsu black belt, music producer, and author. He also hosts his own podcast called Eddie Bravo Radio. Garry will be competeing at Eddie Bravo Invitational: EBI3 on March 22, 2015 with more info & PPV access available @ www.eddiebravoinvitational.com

item.title: #627 - Joey Diaz
item.description: Joey “CoCo” Diaz is a Cuban-American stand up comedian and actor. Joey also hosts his own podcast called “The Church of What’s Happening Now” available on Spotify. http://www.joeydiaz.net http://podcasts.joerogan.net

item.title: #626 - Trevor Moore
item.description: Trevor Moore is a actor, comedian, writer, director, producer and musician, best known as the founding member of the comedy troupe The Whitest Kids U' Know. His latest special "High on Church" is available now at trevormoore.comedydirect.com

item.title: #625 - Steve Maxwell
item.description: Steve Maxwell is an American fitness coach, physical educator, and Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu instructor. He was named one of the top 100 trainers in the USA by Men’s Journal.

item.title: #624 - Tom Segura
item.description: Tom Segura is a stand-up comedian, and hosts his own podcast with his wife, Christina Pazsitzky called "Your Mom's House" available on Spotify.

item.title: #623 - Ari Shaffir
item.description: Ari Shaffir is a stand-up comedian and hosts his own podcasts “Ari Shaffir’s Skeptic Tank” available on Spotify. He also has a special premiering on Comedy Central, March 13th, 2015 at 11:59pm called "Passive Aggressive".

item.title: #622 - Adam Carolla
item.description: Adam Carolla is a comedian, radio personality, television host and actor. Check out his new movie "Road Hard" at roadhardmovie.com http://podcasts.joerogan.net/

item.title: #621 - Aubrey Marcus
item.description: Aubrey Marcus is writer, entrepreneur, and adventurer. Some of his writings and experiences can be found on his website as well as links to his latest venture, Onnit Labs.

item.title: #620 - Bert Kreischer
item.description: Bert Kreischer is a stand-up comedian, actor and reality television host. Check out his book "Life of the Party" on Amazon and his podcast "Bertcast" available on Spotify.

item.title: #619 - Bryan Callen & Brendan Schaub
item.description: Bryan Callen is an actor and stand-up comedian. Brendan Schaub is a mixed martial artist and also a former college & pro football player. Together they host "The Fighter & The Kid" podcast available on Spotify.

item.title: #617 - Brian Regan
item.description: Brian Regan is one of the top stand-up comedians working today, find him touring all over the country at http://BrianRegan.com

item.title: #618 - Artie Lange
item.description: Artie Lange is an actor, writer, comedian, radio personality, and author. He recently started his own podcast available at http://ArtieQuitter.com

item.title: #616 - John Wayne Parr
item.description: John Wayne Parr is an Australian middleweight kickboxer and boxer, fighting out of Boonchu Gym in Gold Coast, Queensland. He is a 10-time World Champion in Muay Thai and runner up in The Contender Asia.

item.title: Fight Companion - February 22, 2015
item.description: Joe is joined by Eddie Bravo, John Wayne Parr, Brendan Schaub & Bryan Callen to watch the fights on February 22, 2015.

item.title: #614 - Christopher Ryan, PhD
item.description: Christopher Ryan, PhD is a psychologist, speaker, and author of New York Times best seller "Sex At Dawn" - http://chrisryanphd.com/ http://podcasts.joerogan.net

item.title: #615 - Greg Fitzsimmons
item.description: Greg Fitzsimmons is a stand-up comedian. He also hosts his own podcast "FitzDog Radio" available on Spotify.

item.title: #613 - Ms. Pat
item.description: Ms. Pat is a stand-up comedienne, and will have a story featured on an upcoming episode of "This Is Not Happening" on Comedy Central airing Thursday night at 12:30am.

item.title: Fight Companion - February 14, 2015
item.description: Joe is joined by Eddie Bravo, Brendan Schaub, Tait Fletcher, Ben Saunders, and Justin Milos to watch the fights on February 14, 2015.

item.title: #612 - Billy Corben
item.description: Billy Corben is a documentary producer and director, best known for his films "Cocaine Cowboys " & "Cocaine Cowboys 2" and also "Broke" & "The U" for ESPN's 30 for 30 series. His latest film "Dawg Fight" will be available online on March 12, 2015. http://www.dawg-fight.com http://podcasts.joerogan.net

item.title: #611 - Josh McDermitt
item.description: Josh McDermitt is an actor and comedian. He is best known for playing Eugene Porter on AMC's The Walking Dead.

item.title: #610 - Brian Cox
item.description: Professor Brian Cox is an English physicist and Professor of Particle Physics in the School of Physics and Astronomy at the University of Manchester in the UK. His BBC science comedy show/podcast "Infinite Monkey Cage" with comedian Robin Ince will be touring the US during the spring of 2015.

item.title: #609 - Tom Papa
item.description: Tom Papa is a comedian, actor, writer and television/radio host. Tom has a great story on "This Is Not Happening" here - http://youtu.be/487y7zJzkFM

item.title: #608 - Ali Rizvi
item.description: Ali Rizvi is a writer, musician, physician, currently working on his first book, The Atheist Muslim. http://www.huffingtonpost.com/ali-a-rizvi/ http://podcasts.joerogan.net

item.title: #607 - Joe Schilling
item.description: Joe Schilling is an American Muay Thai kickboxer who competes in the super middleweight and light heavyweight divisions. Joe's upcoming fight is February 6th at Glory 19 on Spike TV.

item.title: #606 - Randall Carlson
item.description: Randall Carlson is a master builder and architectural designer, teacher, geometrician, geomythologist, geological explorer and renegade scholar.

item.title: #605 - Barry Rothbart
item.description: Barry Rothbart is a comedian, actor and writer. Check him out soon when his story airs on Comedy Central's "This Is Not Happening" hosted by Ari Shaffir on February 12 at 12:30am.

item.title: #603 - Justin Wren
item.description: Justin Wren is an American MMA fighter, formerly on the Ultimate Fighter. He recently returned from a 1-year mission helping the Pygmy people of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Learn more about his project here: FightFortheForgotten.com

item.title: #604 - Eddie Huang & Randall Park
item.description: Eddie Huang is a restaurateur, food personality, sandwich hack, and former lawyer. His book "Fresh Off The Boat" is the inspiration for a new sitcom of the same name starring Randall Park airing on ABC starting in February.

item.title: #602 - Ari Shaffir & Duncan Trussell
item.description: Ari Shaffir is a stand-up comedian and hosts his own podcasts “Ari Shaffir’s Skeptic Tank” available on Spotify. He also has a new season of "This Is Not Happening" premiering on Comedy Central, January 22 at 12:30am. Duncan Trussell is a stand-up comedian, and host of his own podcast "The Duncan Trussell Family Hour". http://arishaffir.com http://duncantrussell.com http://podcasts.joerogan.net

item.title: #601 - Katy Bowman
item.description: Katy Bowman is a biomechanist, heavy on the bio, and author of books on natural movement & human development, solving diseases of captivity. http://www.katysays.com/

item.title: #599 - Shane Smith
item.description: Shane Smith is a Canadian-American journalist. He also is the co-founder and CEO of the international media company VICE.

item.title: #600 - Ari Shaffir
item.description: Ari Shaffir is a stand-up comedian and hosts his own podcasts “Ari Shaffir’s Skeptic Tank” available on Spotify. He also has a new special premiering on Comedy Central, January 16th, 2015 at 11:59pm called "Ari Shaffir: Paid Regular" http://arishaffir.com

item.title: #598 - Joey "CoCo" Diaz
item.description: Joey “CoCo” Diaz is a Cuban-American stand up comedian and actor. Joey also hosts his own podcast called “The Church of What’s Happening Now”, available on Spotify.

item.title: #597 - Magnus Walker & Alex Ross
item.description: Magnus Walker is a driver, a famous collector and builder of Porsches. He's in a short documentary called "Urban Outlaw" featuring his cars and his obsession with Porsches.  Alex Ross is the owner, and co-founder of Sharkwerks, which creates dialed-in, tweaked-out modern Porsches for Porsche enthusiasts.

item.title: #596 - Brian Stann
item.description: Brian Stann is a retired mixed martial artist and U.S. Marine, who competed as a Middleweight in the UFC. He is a former WEC Light Heavyweight Champion and is currently an analyst & commentator for the UFC.

item.title: #595 - Nick DiPaolo
item.description: Nick DiPaolo is a writer and stand up comedian. His latest special "Another Senseless Killing" is available now at http://www.nickdipaolo.com.

item.title: #593 - Josh Fox
item.description: Josh Fox is a film director and environmental activist, best known for his Oscar-nominated documentary, Gasland & Gasland II.

item.title: #592 - Bert Kreischer
item.description: Bert Kreischer is a stand-up comedian, actor and reality television host. Check out his new book "Life of the Party" on Amazon and his podcast "Bertcast" available on Spotify.

item.title: #591 - Kevin Pereira
item.description: Kevin Pereira is a game show host, TV personality, and podcast creator. Check out the "Pointless Podcast" available on Spotify.

item.title: #590 - Ana Kasparian
item.description: Ana Kasparian is a producer and co-host of "The Young Turks" and also teaches journalism at Cal State Northridge.

item.title: #589 - Chris Harris
item.description: Chris Harris is an automotive enthusiast. He "writes and does low-rent videos about cars".

item.title: #588 - Philip DeFranco
item.description: Philip DeFranco is a popular YouTube and internet personality. He hosts "The Philip DeFranco Show" where news stories are discussed every Monday-Thursday at youtube.com/sxephil

item.title: #587 - Ron Finley
item.description: Ron Finely is a "guerrilla gardener" from South Central, LA. After giving his first TED Talk in 2012, Ron has been spreading his "vision for community gardening and rejuvenation" all over the world.

item.title: Fight Companion - Dec. 16, 2014
item.description: Joe is joined by Eddie Bravo, Brendan Schaub & Bryan Callen to watch a few old fights and also discuss some other topics.

item.title: #586 - Kill Tony Cast - Tony Hinchcliffe, Sara Weinshenk & Kimberly Congdon
item.description: Kill Tony is a podcast on the Deathsquad.tv network. A show created by Tony Hinchcliffe and Redban, where young comedians do 1-minute of stand up to be judged by weekly guests. Every episode also features two regulars doing a brand new minute each week, Kimberly Congdon and Sara Weinshenk.

item.title: #585 - John Heffron
item.description: John Heffron is a stand-up comedian and a past winner of "Last Comic Standing" on NBC.

item.title: #584 - Zoltan Istvan
item.description: Zoltan Istvan is a futurist, philosopher, journalist, author of #1 best-selling novel "The Transhumanist Wager" & 2016 US Presidential candidate for the Transhumanist Party.

item.title: #583 - Bill Burr
item.description: Bill Burr is a standup comedian and also hosts his own podcast called "Monday Morning Podcast" available on Spotify. His latest special "I'm Sorry You Feel That Way" premieres on Netflix on December 5th, 2014.

item.title: #581 - Andreas Antonopoulos
item.description: Andreas Antonopoulos is a bitcoin entrepreneur, he also serves on the advisory boards of several bitcoin startups and serves as the Chief Security Officer of Blockchain.

item.title: #580 - Lewis, from Unbox Therapy
item.description: Unbox Therapy is a YouTube channel "where products get naked." Lewis does in-depth reviews of new tech products releasing to the consumer market.  http://www.youtube.com/unboxtherapy

item.title: #579 - Rory MacDonald
item.description: Rory MacDonald is a Canadian mixed martial artist currently signed with the UFC fighting in the Welterweight division. He is a former King of the Cage Lightweight Champion.

item.title: #578 - Peter McGraw
item.description: Peter McGraw is an associate professor of Marketing and Psychology at the University of Colorado at Boulder. Along with journalist Joel Warner, they are responsible for "The Humor Code" - a bestselling book, blog & international research project. His research spans the fields of judgment and decision making, emotion, affect, and mood.

item.title: #577 - Duncan Trussell
item.description: Duncan Trussell is a stand-up comedian, and host of his own podcast "The Duncan Trussell Family Hour" available on Spotify.

item.title: #576 - Jim Shockey
item.description: Jim Shockey is an outdoor writer, a professional big game outfitter and television producer for many hunting shows. Jim has hunted in more than forty countries and has taken nearly three-hundred known species. Check out the new season of "Uncharted" airing in 2015 on the Outdoor Channel.

item.title: #575 - Matt Fulchiron
item.description: Matt Fulchiron is a stand-up comedian and also hosts his own podcast called "The Full Charge Power Hour" available on Spotify.

item.title: #574 - Dr. Mark Gordon, Matthew Gosney & Jason Hall
item.description: Dr. Mark Gordon is the Medical Director of Education at Access Medical Laboratory and is recognized as a top leader world wide in Interventional Endocrinology (Anti Aging Medicine). Matthew Gosney is a former Navy SEAL and current patient of Dr. Gordon's. Jason Hall is a screenwriter, his new movie "American Sniper" stars Bradley Cooper and is directed by Clint Eastwood releases this winter.

item.title: #573 - Daniele Bolelli
item.description: Daniele Bolelli is an Italian author, professor, and martial artist. His books include "Create Your Own Religion" and "On the Warrior's Path" and he is the host of the podcast called The Drunken Taoist.

item.title: #571 - Josh Zepps
item.description: Josh Zepps is the host of HuffPost Live & Point of Inquiry, "a podcast for reason & science" which you can find on Spotify.

item.title: #572 - Dom Irrera
item.description: Dom Irrera is a stand up comedian, and also hosts his own podcast called "Dom Irrera Live from The Laugh Factory."

item.title: #569 - Joe Perry
item.description: Joe Perry is a guitar player, singer, songwriter, and co-founder of Aerosmith.

item.title: #568 - Dr. Rhonda Patrick
item.description: Dr. Rhonda Patrick is a Ph.D in biomedical science and expert on nutritional health. Her podcasts and other videos can be found at FoundMyFitness.com http://www.youtube.com/user/FoundMyFitness

item.title: Fight Companion - October 25, 2014
item.description: Joe is joined by Eddie Bravo, Brendan Schaub, Ian McCall, Kareem Masarani, Aubrey Marcus, and Whitney Miller to watch the fights on October 25, 2014.

item.title: #567 - Cameron Hanes
item.description: Cameron Hanes is a bowhunting athlete, "training intensively each and every day to become the Ultimate Predator."

item.title: #565 - Trevor Valle
item.description: Trevor Valle is paleontologist and the host of 'Mammoth Unearthed' debuting on October 26th on the NatGeo Channel.

item.title: #566 - Sue Aikens
item.description: Sue Aikens is a woman living in Kavik, 197 miles North of the Arctic Circle in extreme isolation. Her motto is "If it hurts, don't think about it." Check out on the new season of "Life Below Zero" on NatGeo November 4th.

item.title: #564 - Sturgill Simpson
item.description: Sturgill Simpson is an American country music singer-songwriter. He has released two albums independently, "High Top Mountain" & "Metamodern Sounds in Country Music" available on Spotify.

item.title: #563 - David Choe
item.description: David Choe is an American painter, muralist, graffiti artist and graphic novelist from Los Angeles, CA. Check out his podcast at DVDASA.com

item.title: #562 - Paul Stanley
item.description: Paul Stanley is an American hard rock guitarist, singer, and painter, best known for being the frontman of the rock band Kiss.

item.title: #561 - Bruce Damer
item.description: Dr. Bruce Damer is a polymath scientist, designer, author and general explorer of liminal realms. He has worked for over a decade in simulation and design of space missions for NASA, develops biochemical models for the origin of life at UC Santa Cruz and collects vintage computers and their history in his DigiBarn computer museum. He has a practice exploring beyond the edges of consciousness to bring back stuff that is meaningful for humanity and the Gaian prerogative. http://www.damer.com http://levityzone.org/

item.title: #558 - Honey Honey
item.description: Honey Honey is a band, featuring members Suzanne Santo and Ben Jaffe, from Los Angeles, CA. They are currently recording a new album and can be seen touring all over the world.

item.title: #559 - Keith Weber
item.description: Keith Weber is the creator of "Extreme Kettlebell Cardio" DVDs, a physiotherapist, triathlete, and "physical culturist."

item.title: #560 - Anthony Cumia
item.description: Anthony Cumia is an "exiled radio host" formerly of The O&A Show, now hosting The Anthony Cumia Show available at AnthonyCumia.com

item.title: #557 - Bryan Callen
item.description: Bryan Callen is an actor and stand-up comedian, and together with Brendan Schaub he also hosts "The Fighter & The Kid" podcast available on Spotify.

item.title: #556 - Bryan Callen
item.description: Bryan Callen is an actor and stand-up comedian, and together with Brendan Schaub he also hosts "The Fighter & The Kid" podcast available on Spotify.

item.title: #555 - Rory Albanese
item.description: Rory Albanese is a stand-up comedian and former executive producer/writer for The Daily Show with Jon Stewart. He's currently working on the Sundance Channel's "The Approval Matrix" and next year look for him on "Minority Report" on Comedy Central.

item.title: #554 - W. Kamau Bell
item.description: W. Kamau Bell is a stand-up comic and former host of the FXX television series "Totally Biased with W. Kamau Bell".

item.title: #553 - Thaddeus Russell
item.description: Thaddeus Russell is an adjunct professor of American Studies at Occidental College, and also the author of "A Renegade History of The United States".

item.title: #552 - Kid Cudi
item.description: Scott Mescudi, aka Kid Cudi, is an American recording artist and actor from Cleveland, Ohio.

item.title: Fight Companion - Sept. 20, 2014
item.description: Joe is joined by Eddie Bravo and the hosts from "The Fighter & The Kid" podcast, Brendan Schaub & Bryan Callen, to watch the fights on Sept. 20, 2014.

item.title: #551 - Graham Hancock
item.description: Graham Hancock is an English author and journalist, well known for books such as "Fingerprints Of The Gods" & "Entangled" and also a new fiction book called "War God".

item.title: #550 - Rupert Sheldrake
item.description: Rupert Sheldrake is an author, lecturer, and researcher in the field of parapsychology, known for his proposed theory of morphic resonance.

item.title: #549 - Big Jay Oakerson
item.description: Big Jay Oakerson is a stand up comedian and he also hosts his own show "Legion of Skanks Podcast" available on Spotify.

item.title: #548 - Tim Burnett
item.description: Tim Burnett is a hunter, adventurer, and videographer. He can be seen hunting all over the world on "Solo Hunter" on the Outdoor Channel.

item.title: #547 - Joe DeRosa

item.title: #346 - Douglas Rushkoff
item.description: Douglas Rushkoff is an American media theorist, writer, columnist, lecturer, graphic novelist and documentarian. He is best known for his advocacy of open source solutions to social problems, and also has written many books on topics including society, media, and technology. Rushkoff also had the first syndicated column in the New York Times on cyberculture.

item.title: #345 - Bryan Callen
item.description: Bryan Callen is an actor, stand-up comedian, and host of his own podcasts: The Bryan Callen Show and The 10-Minute Podcast, with co-hosts Will Sasso and Chris D'Elia.

item.title: #336 - Scott Sigler
item.description: Scott Sigler is an American author known for science fiction and horror books, such as Nocturnal, Ancestor, Infected and Contagious. Before being published, Scott built an online audience by giving away his self-recorded audiobooks for free as podcasts.

item.title: #337 - Justin Wren
item.description: Justin Wren is an American MMA fighter, formerly on the Ultimate Fighter. He is currently on a 1-year mission helping the Pygmy people of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. Learn more about his project here: FightFortheForgotten.com

item.title: #335 - Bas Rutten

item.title: #334 - Dr. Amit Goswami
item.description: Amit Goswami, Ph. D. is a retired professor from the theoretical physics department of the University of Oregon in Eugene. item.title: #333 - David Lee Roth

item.description: Tom Segura is a stand-up comedian, and hosts his own podcast with his wife, Christina Pazsitzky called Your Mom's House.
